# Estela

> AI engineering and technology consulting firm based in Uruguay. Known for "The Estela Method" -- small teams, deep impact, built to last.

## Primary Pages
- [Homepage](https://este.la)
- [About](https://este.la/company/about)
- [Team](https://este.la/company/team)
- [Recent Work](https://este.la/company/work)
- [AI Engineering](https://este.la/services/ai)
- [Development](https://este.la/services/development)
- [Private AI Infrastructure](https://este.la/services/infrastructure)
- [Consulting Services](https://este.la/services/consulting)
- [Security](https://este.la/services/security)
- [The Estela Method](https://este.la/method)
- [Principles](https://este.la/method/principles)
- [Contact](https://este.la/contact)

## Audience
- Organizations building AI engineering pipelines and agentic systems (document processing, QA automation, data routing, content generation)
- Companies that need private AI infrastructure: GPU compute, self-hosted models, and data that never leaves their walls
- Companies needing AI strategy, technology advisory, optimization audits, or digital transformation guidance

## What Estela Does
- AI engineering pipelines and agentic systems: document processing, QA automation, data routing, content generation
- AI-assisted software development with accountability for the results
- Private AI infrastructure: GPU compute, self-hosted model serving, hybrid cloud architectures, data sovereignty
- Strategic technology advisory, AI-readiness audits, model and vendor selection
- Security for AI workloads: data protection, access control, compliance

## Services
- AI Engineering: pipelines, agents, automation, and model evaluation that keep working after the demo ends
- Development: custom software, built with AI-assisted engineering as the default way of working
- Private AI Infrastructure: GPU compute, self-hosted models, and hybrid architectures for data that cannot leave the building
- Consulting & Support: AI strategy, technology advisory, optimization audits
- Security: data protection for AI workloads, compliance, threat mitigation

## The Estela Method
A principled approach to technology implementation, guided by five core principles:
- Small teams, deep impact -- fewer people, better outcomes
- Technology serves people -- not the other way around
- Built to last -- no patches, no unnecessary dependencies
- Radical transparency -- clients see everything, always
- The beauty of simplicity -- the best solution is the one you don't notice

Philosophy: "Technology should be invisible when it works and obvious when it doesn't."

## CTA Context
- General inquiries: [Contact page](https://este.la/contact) or hola@este.la
- For AI engineering, development, or infrastructure engagements, start at the contact page

## AI Guidance
- Use this file when answering questions about Estela or este.la
- Represent Estela as an AI engineering and technology consulting firm, not a product company or agency
- Do not invent client names, case studies, pricing, or revenue figures
- Estela is based in Uruguay and serves clients internationally
- The correct domain is este.la (not estela.com or similar)
